tools.name: Business Profile
tools.description: Set up business identity — every other Terrapin tool reads this profile

tools.name: Catering Quote Builder
tools.description: Build professional catering quotes with menu items, guest counts, and pricing
tools.output: Formatted catering quote with line items and total, copy-to-clipboard email output

tools.name: Contractor Invoice Generator
tools.description: Create professional PDF invoices with labor and materials line items

data_format.description: Pass as base64-encoded JSON via ?data= param
data_format.note: business info and tax rate auto-fill from business profile in localStorage

tools.output: Professional PDF invoice with line items, tax, and totals

tools.name: Simple CRM
tools.description: Track contacts, follow-ups, and notes for small service businesses
tools.output: Contact list with follow-up tracking, JSON export

tools.name: Tip Calculator & Staff Splitter
tools.description: Calculate tips and split across staff roles
tools.output: Tip breakdown per role with per-person amounts

tools.name: Street Vendor Order Log
tools.description: Tap-to-log order tracker for food trucks, taco stands, and cash businesses
tools.output: Daily sales summary with item counts, revenue, and best seller

tools.name: QR Code Generator
tools.description: Create QR codes for URLs, WiFi, Zelle, phone, email, or text
tools.output: QR code preview with PNG and SVG download

tools.name: Job Site Daily Log
tools.description: Daily log for contractors — crew, work, materials, issues, PDF output
tools.output: Dated PDF log entry saved to localStorage

tools.name: Simple Calendar
tools.description: Track appointments, jobs, events and deadlines
